Controls
W/S: throttle / brake
A/D: steer
P: pause / resume
C: reset camera
Mouse drag: orbit camera
Tip: click and drag to look around
Speed: 0.0
Race
Lap Time: 00:00.000
Best Lap: --:--.---

Kart Customizer

Pick a section, click a color, then start the race.

Choose the arena look before you enter the track.
Preview cards show the look of the road, curbs, and lighting vibe.
